overview: High-conversion real estate website for Patidar Property Solution, a local property broker in Kudasan, Gandhinagar. The site is built for fast decisions — mobile-first, WhatsApp-first, with browsable property listings, detailed property modals, and trust-building sections.
features: Property listings grid (rent, buy, commercial) with filter bar
Clickable property cards with full detail modal (photos, specs, amenities, CTAs)
Hero with WhatsApp and Call CTAs, trust badges
Sticky floating WhatsApp and Call buttons
Why Choose Us, How We Work, Testimonials sections
Mobile-first responsive design with sticky header
Hardcoded demo listings — no backend required
